title: Google Summer of Code Contributor Program
snippet: Google Summer of Code is a global, online program focused on bringing new contributors into open source software development. GSoC Contributors work with an open source organization on a 12+ week programming project under the guidance of mentors.

title: Google Summer of Code Program
snippet: Google Summer of Code is a global, online mentoring program focused on introducing new contributors to open source software development. GSoC contributors work on a 12+ week programming project with the guidance of mentors from their open source organization.

title: Google Summer of Code contributor
snippet: The Google Summer of Code program provides an opportunity for contributors to spend 12+ weeks coding on open source projects remotely, guided by mentors. Potential GSoC contributors submit proposals to mentor organizations during a specific Contributor Application Period.

title: Google Summer of Code (GSoC) Contributor
snippet: Spend your summer writing code for an open source software project! You must be at least 18, a student or open source beginner, and eligible to work in your country of residence.
